caption:
New Toy Story 5: The Experience at Westfield London ✨🚀 🧸

Featuring interactive fan experiences, immersive rooms, challenges, and nostalgic moments 😊

📆11th–21st June 
📍Level 0, The Atrium (free to visit, walk-ins only)

🎁 Collect all 5 physical tokens throughout the experience and collect your reward at the bar (available while stocks last)

🎬 I also got the chance to see Toy Story 5 at the cinema, and it was a truly special evening✨🧸

@disneystudiosuk @westfieldlondon

transcription.text: I remember I loved you Came back when it mattered, I saw you Standing there in the light of the window Wearing that same smile Man, it's been a while But I knew it, I knew ya I knew it, I knew ya
